remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Select up to two target creatures
remaining_params.SpellDescription: Tap up to two target creatures. Put a stun counter on either of them. Then put a stun counter on either of them. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)
remaining_params.StackDescription: Tap {c:Targeted}. {p:You} puts a stun counter on a creature targeted by this spell. Then {p:You} puts a stun counter on a creature targeted by this spell.
